SEARCH

Package client.view

package client.view
JavaFX controllers and reusable widgets for the GoNature user interface.
  • Class
    Description
    ApprovalQueueController
    Approval-queue screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
    BaseController
    Lifecycle base for screens that participate in the realtime push channel.
    CancellationsReportController
    Cancellations report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
    CancellationsReportController.ParkOption
    Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.
    DashboardController
    Dashboard: a role-aware overview that greets the logged-in actor, shows a few real summary cards plus an attention line, and offers a quick-link launchpad.
    GateController
    The park-gate screen, visible to a PARK_EMPLOYEE only (gated in MainShellController; the server also re-checks the role on every op).
    GuideRegisterController
    SERVICE_REP-only form that registers a visitor as a group guide.
    MainShellController
    Controls the persistent shell: sidebar nav, topbar title, connection pill, the logged-in user chrome, and the contentArea swap point.
    MainShellController.NavItem
    One sidebar entry: the screen plus the rule deciding who may see it.
    NotificationCenterController
    Notification center, reachable from the sidebar by any logged-in actor.
    ParkParamsController
    Park-parameter edit screen, visible to a PARK_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
    ReservationCreateController
    Booking form for a new park reservation (INDIVIDUAL / FAMILY / GROUP visits).
    ReservationCreateController.ParkOption
    Park dropdown entry: carries the id but renders the name.
    ReservationListController
    "My Reservations" screen: look up a visitor's reservations by id and manage them.
    SubscriberRegisterController
    SERVICE_REP-only form that registers a new subscriber.
    UsageReportController
    Usage report screen.
    UsageReportController.ParkOption
    Park dropdown entry: id is null for all parks.
    UserLoginController
    Controller for UserLoginView.fxml — the combined connect + sign-in screen that runs at startup and again after logout.
    UserLoginController.Quick
    One seeded account reachable via a quick-login button: staff carry a username; visitors carry a visitorId (the other is null).
    VisitsReportController
    Visits-by-Type report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController).
    VisitsReportController.ParkOption
    Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.
    WaitlistController
    "My Waiting List" screen (visitor-facing): the logged-in visitor's WAITING reservations, fetched via LIST_WAITLIST.
    WaitlistController.TickTarget
    One offered row's countdown state: where to write, and which Accept to disable at zero.
    Widgets
    Reusable view fragments shared by multiple screen controllers.
